W.^.ft, 893(30, lift® 2 4 1 ^ , 2 0 0 0 15. m^/fa. 913(30, lift® 12 f^TSTC, 2000 16. m^T.f5!. 394(30,Hft©31lf, 2002 17. m ^ - f t 842(30, lift© 271^^,2002 3lk 18. m^T.'PT. 221(30, lift® 19 31%, 2006 MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY BOARD) , NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the Uth August, 2006 G.S.R. 477(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (g) of Sub-section (2) of Section 60, read with 5fPtion 198 of the Railways Act, 1989 (24 of 1989), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to «pend the Indian Railways (Open Lines) General Rules, 1976, namely :— 1. (1) These rules maybe calledthe Indian Railways (Open Lines) Cieneral(TiurdAmendn]ent) Rules, 2006. (2) - They shall comeintoforceonthedateofthekr^UcationmtheOfflcM Gazette. 2. In the Indian Railways (Open Lines) General Rules, 1976 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule (i) in sub-rule (2), for clause (b), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:— "(b)meanwhile withhold the closing ofthe block section to ensure thatnotramisallowedtoenterlheblock section from the station in rear, and" -- 2 of 3 -- 0i) after sub-rule (2), the following sub-rule shall beinserted, namely:— "(3) Where in a section, a block proving axle counter or continuous track circuiting between block stations and complete track circuiting of station section excluding non-running lines of the receiving station is installed and is functioning and there is a clear indication of clearance of block section as well as complete arrival of the train as per indication given, if a train passes a station without conforming to the provisions of sub-clause (1) above, the Station Master shall still advice the station in advance to stop the train to see that the defect is remedied and he need not withhold closing ofblock section in rear as prescribed in clause (b) and (c) of sub-rule 2 in such cases." ' 3. In the said rules, in rule 14.10,— , (0 for sub-rule 2, the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— "(2) Before such signal is given, the Station Master shall satisfy himself as per the prescribed special instructions" (n) for sub-rule 4, the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— "(4) Where in a section, ablock proving axle counter or continuous track circuiting between block stations and complete track circuiting of station section excluding non-running lines of the receiving station is install PA and is fijuctionin1' and there is a clear indicatioii of clearance ofblock sectioii as '•.veil as complete arrival ofthe train as per indication given, it would be taken as assurance for complete arrival of the train to the Station Master." [No. 99/Safety (A & R)/19/7] S. B. GHOSH DAS1T0AR, Member Traffic & ex-officio Secy.
